headline: Markets wrestled with conflicting signals as Bitcoin's institutional breakout to $73k collided with …
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Apr 11, 2026 Markets wrestled with conflicting signals as Bitcoin's institutional breakout to $73k collided with CPI's jump to 3.3%, forcing a hawkish Fed repricing. Risk assets held gains despite rising stagflation fears, suggesting crypto momentum is temporarily overpowering traditional macro headwinds. CLOSING PRICES BTC: $73,425 · ETH: $2,303 · SOL: $85.48 · GOLD: $4,760 · SPY: $679.46 (+0.5%) · QQQ: $611.07 (+0.8%) · VIX: $19.23 (-1.3%) · TLT: $86.49 (-0.5%) · DXY: $98.7 (-0.1%) · OIL: $96.57 (-1.3%) SECTOR CLOSE ▲ SMH (Semiconductors) +11.4% · COPX (Copper Miners) +8.7% · XLB (Materials) +3.1% ▼ XLE (Energy) -3.9% · XLV (Healthcare) +0.3% · XLP (Consumer Staples) +0.6% SIGNALS — Crypto / Bitcoin (intensity 71) — BTC, ETH EVENING NEWS ▼ Should You Be Investing in Bitcoin... or a Basket of Diversified Cryptocurrencies?
